name: Vivek Kumar
title: Lead Mobile Developer · Flutter · Android · iOS
summary: Mobile engineering lead with 8+ years building production apps across Android and iOS, specializing in Flutter migrations and scalable cross‑platform architecture.
Experienced in leading teams, defining architecture, instituting code reviews, and strengthening CI/CD and QA to improve release quality and speed.
Domain depth in IoT and healthcare, including BLE/Wi‑Fi provisioning, QR onboarding, OTA firmware, subscriptions, secure data flows, and multi‑region launches.

experience.company: Centific Global Technologies India Pvt. Ltd.
bullets: Led mobile team delivery with architecture definition, mentorship, and best practices.
Planned migrations to Flutter/React Native; strengthened CI/CD and QA to reduce release failures.
Aligned stakeholders, conducted reviews, and ensured maintainable codebases.
Migrated native apps to Flutter with new UI/UX and robust unit/widget testing.
Built BLE/Wi‑Fi commissioning with QR, property/room/device management, notifications, IAQ.
Implemented OTA firmware updates, subscriptions with IAP, Alexa/Google Home integrations.
Led 3 developers and delivered multi‑tenant healthcare apps across India, Colombia, Ecuador, and South Africa.
Unified GloryFit wearable integration via Flutter plugin for health vitals over Bluetooth.
Owned code reviews, profiling, debugging, and release quality with QA.
Migrated and upgraded Flutter versions; optimized performance and stabilized plugins.
Integrated 12‑lead ECG, BP, glucose, HR, SpO2, temperature, spirometer, and uric acid devices.
Implemented chat (Socket.io), video streaming, push, Freshchat; shipped Flutter web.
Led a team of 5 across 3 internal projects plus a vendor collaboration from planning to delivery.
Instituted estimation, tracking, and escalation practices; delivered multilingual/multi‑currency features.
Built native Android apps for field ops and order booking with a multi‑business cart.
Implemented live/geo tracking, SLA, PODS, payments (Paytm, Ezetap, Pine Lab), and performance optimizations.
